body:
Drive halt conditions (author pre-commit, 2026-05-18):
- ac-02: research Claude Code plugin-hook registration surface (plugin.json hooks field vs .claude/settings.json hooks block) before writing hook code; halt for input if no clear pattern emerges from docs or marketplace examples.
- ac-04: pause after drafting call-point prose for /orb:implement, /orb:researcher, /orb:review-pr; sanity-check imperative voice across all three before committing.

Review-spec cycle 1 (REQUEST_CHANGES) resolution:
- ac-02 hook surface pinned to plugin-shipped at plugins/orb/hooks/hooks.json (Claude Code plugin loader reads hooks from this path per memory missing-hooks-json-smoke-test); zero-config delivery to consumer repos.
- ac-02 graceful degradation added: skip when .orbit/ absent; warn when marker file missing.
- ac-02 path filter added: skip .orbit/, .claude/, config-extension files; trigger on all others.
- ac-03 lifecycle hedge dropped: session-id header comparison is the sole mechanism (no Stop hook, no clock TTL).
- ac-05 tag→label rename across description, verification, and goal field; CLI surface is orbit memory remember --label and orbit memory search.
- ac-07 hard-coded date softened to <ship-date+4w>; warning-fire count segmented by file kind.

Review-spec cycle 2 (REQUEST_CHANGES) resolution:
- ac-02 HIGH: plugin-shipped hooks confirmed via Claude Code plugins reference (https://code.claude.com/docs/en/plugins-reference.md). Description now cites the docs; verification gains a load-time smoke (install in scratch repo, restart, /hooks reports count ≥ 1 for PreToolUse) with a named fallback to dual-registration in .claude/settings.json if the smoke fails. Memory plugin-shipped-hooks-supported filed.
- ac-02 MEDIUM (toml filter): path filter tightened — only .orbit/, .claude/, *.lock skipped. Source-adjacent config (Cargo.toml, pyproject.toml, package.json, nested yaml/json) is intentionally in-scope of the discipline.
Drive completed implementation: ac-01..ac-06 closed (skill, hook, marker, call-points, METHOD.md, card 0025 reframe). ac-07 defers per ac_type observation band — 4-week audit fires at ship-date+4w.
